AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description:
This app tracks mileage trips and logs expenses, offline-only.
Operational Patterns: - Call getTodaySummary first when asked about today's activity, before starting or logging anything new, so the answer reflects the current distance/trip/expense totals. - Call startTrackingTrip to begin a trip and stopTrackingTrip to end the currently active one; only one trip can be active at a time, so calling startTrackingTrip again while a trip is already active is a no-op on the existing trip. - Call logExpense to record a completed expense (amount already known); it does not open any UI or require further confirmation from the user for its own recording step.
Constraints: - Expense amounts above ₹5,000 require manager approval after being logged; logExpense itself always succeeds locally and returns the resulting status. - All data is local to the device; no network calls are made by any function here.
